detailedDescription:
Nvidia's Ampere flagship — the BFGPU.
24GB of GDDR6X for 4K gaming, 8K output, and serious professional workloads.
additionalSpecs:
GPU: GA102 | Architecture: Ampere
CUDA Cores: 10496 | RT Cores: 82 | Tensor Cores: 328
VRAM: 24GB GDDR6X (384-bit bus)
Memory Bandwidth: 936 GB/s
Display Outputs: 3x DisplayPort 1.4a, 1x HDMI 2.1
PCIe: x16 (PCIe 4.0)
Recommended PSU: 750W
API Support: DirectX 12 Ultimate, Vulkan, OpenGL 4.6
